message:
feat(ssh): introduce runtime::io shim and DRY SFTP file polling

Add a `runtime::io` module to the SSH crate that re-exports
`AsyncRead`/`AsyncWrite` from smol behind a crate-local path. This
mirrors the `runtime::channel` pattern already in place and gives
the asupersync migration a single point to swap async I/O trait
providers.

In sftp/file.rs, replace four identical inline
`Pin<Box<dyn Future<…>>>` type declarations with an `IoFuture<T>`
alias, extract the repeated poll-or-init-then-take logic into a
shared `poll_io_future` helper, and switch `impl smol::io::AsyncRead`
/ `impl smol::io::AsyncWrite` to use the new shim traits. The
`smol::future::FutureExt` import (previously used for `.poll()`)
is dropped in favor of `Pin::as_mut().poll()`.

No behavioral change — purely structural preparation for the
tokio→asupersync runtime switch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
